svg.title: Iteration 5 — Fault Handling & Battery Management with Performance Metrics

g.text: Iteration 5 — Fault Handling & Battery Management with Performance Metrics
check battery before each move step
Requeue clears FaultType on the\nrequeued event and properly updates\neventsPerZone so GUI shows fire still active.
close GUI window (or all events processed)
UDP RETURN (to all drones in field)
